---
title: ""
pagetitle: "Posts"
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
listing:
  contents: posts/**/*.qmd
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 5
  image-height: 168px
  page-size: 10
  categories: true
  sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
  fields: [image, date, title, categories, reading-time]
---

<style>
  /* 1. Header & Spacing Adjustments */
  .quarto-title-block, .page-columns {
    margin-top: -1.5rem !important;
    padding-top: 0 !important;
  }

  /* 2. Title Style */
  .header-title {
    font-weight: 800;
    color: #5a9fd4;
    letter-spacing: -0.5px;
  }

  /* 3. Hide the default "Categories" heading (we use Explore Topics at the bottom) */
  h5.quarto-listing-category-title {
    display: none !important;
  }

  /* 4. Style the Categories Container (moved to bottom via script) */
  .quarto-listing-category {
    margin-top: 50px !important;
    padding-top: 30px !important;
    border-top: 1px solid #333;
    text-align: center;
    justify-content: center;
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: 10px;
  }

  /* 5. Explore Topics label */
  .quarto-listing-category::before {
    content: "Explore Topics";
    display: block;
    width: 100%;
    margin-bottom: 15px;
    font-size: 0.9rem;
    color: #888;
    font-weight: 600;
    letter-spacing: 1.5px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
  }
</style>

```{=html}
<div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-2 flex-wrap gap-2">
<div class="header-title posts-page-heading m-0 p-0" role="heading" aria-level="1" style="font-size: 2.75rem; line-height: 1.1;">My Blogs</div>
<span class="badge-gradient" id="blog-count-badge" aria-live="polite"><span id="blog-count-value">…</span> Posts</span>
</div>
```

<p style="color: #c0c0c0; font-size: 1.2rem; font-weight: 300; margin-bottom: 2.5rem; margin-top: 0;">
Deep dives into Agentic AI, MLOps, and Large Language Models.
</p>

<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
  const listing = document.getElementById("listing-listing");
  const categories = document.querySelector(".quarto-listing-category");

  if (listing && categories) {
    listing.appendChild(categories);
  }

  const countEl = document.getElementById("blog-count-value");
  if (countEl) {
    fetch(new URL("listings.json", window.location.href))
      .then(function (res) {
        return res.json();
      })
      .then(function (data) {
        const entry = data.find(function (x) {
          return x.listing === "/posts.html" ||
            (typeof x.listing === "string" && x.listing.endsWith("/posts.html"));
        });
        if (entry && Array.isArray(entry.items)) {
          countEl.textContent = String(entry.items.length);
        }
      })
      .catch(function () {
        countEl.textContent = "?";
      });
  }

  document.querySelectorAll("#listing-listing a.quarto-grid-link[href]").forEach(function (a) {
    var h = a.getAttribute("href");
    if (!h || h === "#") return;
    a.setAttribute("target", "_blank");
    a.setAttribute("rel", "noopener noreferrer");
  });
});
</script>
